channel.title: Merag Nokhiz — Thoughts
channel.description: Technical essays and deep-dives on cloud architecture, platform engineering, MLOps, GenAI infrastructure, and modern engineering culture.

item.title: AI Cost Curves Don't Behave: Why Classical Scaling Assumptions Break
item.description: AI workloads don't scale like classical systems. Token economics, context windows, and model tiers create cost curves that violate every intuition engineers built over two decades.

item.title: The AI Infrastructure Layer on Azure: Services, Patterns, and Trade-offs
item.description: A concrete breakdown of Azure's AI infrastructure stack — GPU compute tiers, storage architecture, model serving options, and how Azure AI Foundry ties it together.

item.title: Architecture, One Layer Further: UI, Application, Data — and Agentic
item.description: The classic 3-layer model has a hidden assumption: humans are always in the loop. The Agentic Layer changes that — and with it, the role of every layer beneath it.

item.title: Infrastructure as Code Meets AI: The DevOps Revolution You Can't Ignore
item.description: Discover how AI transforms your Infrastructure-as-Code workflows. Learn agentic workflows, security guardrails, and practical entry points with Pulumi AI, Spacelift, and GitHub Copilot.

item.title: Vibe Coding 2026 – Hype or Real Productivity Gain? 🧠
item.description: 92% of developers use AI coding tools daily. But is vibe coding actually making us better engineers — or just faster at producing code we don't fully understand?

item.title: Decoding the Cloud Bill: From Technical Systems to Budget Mastery ☁️
item.description: Navigate your cloud spending with clarity, understanding the technical systems and financial categories that make up your bill.

item.title: Introducing Phi ɸ: Your Meditation Cycler 🌿
item.description: Discover Phi, a serene meditation cycler designed for breath and meditation exercises to cultivate mindfulness and inner peace.

item.title: Welcome to my site! 🎉
item.description: A new beginning full of possibilities and exciting projects. 🚀
